diagrams.title: Virtualization Architecture Stack
diagrams.description: Shows layers from physical hardware to virtual machines
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how virtualization creates isolated virtual environments from physical resources

diagrams.title: Cloud Service Models Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Pyramid showing IaaS, PaaS, SaaS from bottom to top
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the responsibility split between cloud provider and user at each service model

diagrams.title: Cloud Deployment Models Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparison of Public, Private, and Hybrid cloud architectures
diagrams.purpose: Understand different deployment options and their characteristics

diagrams.title: VM Migration Process
diagrams.description: Shows live migration of VM from source host to destination host
diagrams.purpose: Understand how VMs are moved without service interruption for load balancing and maintenance
